app.name: Interior AI
app.tagline: Coohom and Foyr render your design. We cost it, quantify it, and write the proposal — in your style, for your market.

home.title: Design operations, priced for your market
home.subtitle: Upload a floor plan and a brief. Get a concept, a quantified BOQ, a client proposal, and a render — priced in $ against US rates.
home.currencyNote: Amounts shown in $ (USD), before sales tax.

advisory.disclaimer: Rates are directional estimates and need local verification. Construction documents require sign-off by a licensed professional.

errors.server_error: Something went wrong on our side.
